name: Zomato India Food Delivery and Restaurant API
what_it_does: Zomato India food delivery and restaurant REST API for restaurant operators and enterprise food businesses to manage menus, receive delivery orders, and operate on India's largest food delivery platform — serving 500+ cities and covering both restaurant food delivery and Blinkit quick-commerce grocery delivery through Zomato's ecosystem. Enables AI agents to manage restaurant menu for Indian food catalog automation, handle order receipt for kitchen notification automation, access delivery status for order tracking automation, retrieve restaurant analytics for performance reporting automation, manage Hyperpure integration for ingredient supply automation, handle promotional campaign for restaurant marketing automation, access Zomato Gold for premium feature automation, retrieve customer feedback for review management automation, manage multi-outlet for chain restaurant operations automation, and integrate Zomato with POS systems and restaurant management for end-to-end Indian food delivery automation.
use_cases: Receiving and processing food delivery orders from India's largest delivery platform for restaurant POS automation agents
Managing menu items, pricing, and availability for Indian restaurant chain multi-location automation agents
Accessing restaurant performance analytics and customer ratings for business reporting automation agents
Integrating Hyperpure ingredient supply with restaurant operations for inventory management automation agents
not_for: Markets outside India (Zomato is India-focused; international restaurant discovery withdrawn in 2019)
Consumer ordering applications (Zomato restaurant API is for merchant partners only)
Grocery quick-commerce integration (Blinkit is separate platform within Zomato ecosystem)
best_when: A restaurant operator or POS technology vendor in India wanting AI agents to integrate with Zomato's food delivery platform for automated order management, menu control, and analytics across India's largest food delivery marketplace.
avoid_when: RESTAURANT PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Zomato restaurant API requires active restaurant partner agreement on Zomato platform; automated standalone developer API assumption creates no API access; automated integration requires Zomato restaurant partnership. ORDER PROCESSING IS TIME-SENSITIVE: Zomato delivery promises are 30-45 minutes; automated slow order acknowledgment creates poor customer experience and restaurant rating impact on platform. PUBLIC DATA API DEPRECATED: Zomato's public restaurant discovery API (for consumers) was largely deprecated; automated assumption of active public API creates outdated endpoints; automated must use current restaurant partner API, not legacy public API. INDIA-SPECIFIC TAX COMPLIANCE: Indian GST applies to food delivery; automated non-GST compliant invoicing creates tax reporting issues; automated must generate GST-compliant invoices per Indian tax law.

auth.notes: Zomato uses API key for restaurant partner authentication. REST API with JSON. Gurugram, India HQ. Founded 2008 by Deepinder Goyal and Pankaj Chaddah. NSE/BSE:ZOMATO (IPO 2021, ₹66,000 Cr market cap). Products: Food delivery, Blinkit (grocery, acquired 2022), Hyperpure (B2B ingredients), Zomato Gold. 500+ Indian cities. 300,000+ restaurant partners. 100M+ monthly users. Competes with Swiggy for Indian food delivery dominance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for registered restaurant partners; production requires Zomato partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: Restaurant commission: 20-30% per order; advertising and promotional fees separate
pricing.notes: Gurugram IN. NSE/BSE listed. Commission per order. Partnership required. GST compliance needed.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order webhooks near real-time; menu APIs throttled per restaurant

known_agent_gotchas: RESTAURANT PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Zomato restaurant API is not publicly accessible; automated developer API key assumption creates no access; automated must have active restaurant partnership on Zomato platform to receive API credentials

ORDER REAL-TIME RESPONSE REQUIRED: Zomato order fulfillment requires near-instant acknowledgment; automated delayed processing creates auto-cancellation and negative platform score; automated must implement real-time webhook consumer for order events

LEGACY PUBLIC API VS CURRENT PARTNER API: Zomato's historic public data API (user_key) is deprecated; automated use of legacy API endpoints creates 404 or deprecated errors; automated must use current restaurant partner API, not old public API documentation

GST INVOICE COMPLIANCE REQUIRED: Indian GST requires compliant tax invoices for food delivery; automated non-GST invoice generation creates regulatory non-compliance; automated must generate GST-compliant invoices with GSTIN for each order

HYPERPURE IS SEPARATE INTEGRATION: Zomato Hyperpure (B2B ingredient supply) has separate API from food delivery; automated unified Zomato API assumption creates missing Hyperpure capability; automated ingredient procurement requires separate Hyperpure integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: India food delivery. DPDP, GST compliance, PCI-DSS. API key. IN. Customer order and restaurant data.

security_score_components.security_notes: India food delivery. DPDP, GST. API key. IN. Customer order and restaurant data.
